rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target implementation only when the contract binds to implementation-level features or constraints.
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL component type and implementation hierarchy when inserting annexes.
Ensure annex content reflects the scope of the target—type-level for abstract properties, implementation-level for bound expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `annex agree {** ... **};` to enclose contract blocks, and place them directly within the target component or implementation declaration.
Comparison expressions must evaluate to bool; use eq declarations for numeric range conditions.
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annexes into component types when the constraints rely on implementation-specific feature bindings.
irrelevant_topics: assume, guarantee, assign, validator, repair, fusion target selection, requirement-to-clause mapping
